changeSet.author: MohamedFouad
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS resource_files ( id character varying(50) NOT NULL, created_at timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL, file_name character varying(50), file_url character varying(255), thumbnail_url character varying(255), content_type character varying(50), file_size bigint default 0 , CONSTRAINT resource_files_p_key PRIMARY KEY (id) );
